tables.name: Person

columns.name: EmployeeId
columns.description: System-assigned employee number used for payroll and administrative purposes.

columns.name: ManagerId
columns.description: Email address of the employee's direct manager.

columns.name: PositionId
columns.description: Identifier of the position or job slot assigned to the employee.

columns.name: EffectiveDate
columns.description: Date when the current attribute value became effective.

columns.name: HireDate
columns.description: Official date of hire for the employee.

columns.name: SupervisorIndicator
columns.description: Indicates whether the employee is a supervisor.

columns.name: CurrentEmploymentStatus
columns.description: Indicates if the employee is active, on leave, or terminated.

columns.name: CountryOrRegion
columns.description: Country where the employee primarily works, using ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code.

columns.name: RegionSummary
columns.description: Geographic region or state/province of the employee's work location.

columns.name: CitySummary
columns.description: City where the employee primarily works.

columns.name: FirstName
columns.description: Employee's legal first name or given name.

columns.name: LastName
columns.description: Employee's legal last name or family name.

columns.name: FullName
columns.description: Employee's complete formatted name as displayed in the system.

columns.name: AssignedOfficeCity
columns.description: City of the employee's assigned office location.

columns.name: CompanyOfficeState
columns.description: State or province of the employee's assigned company office.

columns.name: EmployeeJobTitle
columns.description: Employee's current job title as displayed in HR systems.

columns.name: FunctionType
columns.description: Functional area or discipline the employee belongs to.

columns.name: StockLevel
columns.description: Employee's stock or equity compensation level.

columns.name: WorkAnniversaryDate
columns.description: Date of the employee's work anniversary or service milestone.

columns.name: PayScaleArea
columns.description: Geographic pay scale area used for compensation benchmarking.

columns.name: ReasonForChangeCode
columns.description: Code indicating the reason for the most recent HR transaction or status change.

columns.name: ExpectedInOfficeDays
columns.description: Number of days per week the employee is expected to work in the office.

columns.name: ApprovedInOfficeDays
columns.description: Number of days per week the employee is approved to work in the office.

columns.name: WorkSiteDesignation
columns.description: Classification of the employee's work site arrangement.

columns.name: StockLevelCompressionInd
columns.description: Indicates whether the employee's stock level is compressed relative to their manager.

columns.name: OrgDepth
columns.description: Number of hierarchical levels from the employee to the top of the reporting chain.

columns.name: SameCountryAsManager
columns.description: Indicates whether the employee works in the same country as their direct manager.

columns.name: InvoluntaryManagerChanges
columns.description: Count of involuntary manager changes experienced by the employee.

columns.name: MetroAreaCluster
columns.description: Metropolitan area cluster to which the employee's work city belongs.

columns.name: WorksiteExceptionGranted
columns.description: Indicates whether a worksite exception has been granted to the employee.

columns.name: FlexibleWorkGuidanceApplicable
columns.description: Indicates whether flexible work guidance policies apply to the employee.

tables.description: Master identity record for every human in system — candidate, employee, former employee — persistent across lifecycle.

tables.name: Position

columns.name: PositionId
columns.description: Identifier of the position or job slot assigned to the employee.

columns.name: PositionTitle
columns.description: Official title of the position in the organization's job architecture.

columns.name: OrgUnitId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the organizational unit.

columns.name: ManagerPositionId
columns.description: Identifier of the position to which this position reports.

columns.name: CareerStage
columns.description: Description of career phase or level.

tables.description: Canonical job slot in the organization — defines role, level, reporting, and structure, independent of who occupies it.

tables.name: OrgHierarchy

columns.name: OrgUnitId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the organizational unit.

columns.name: ParentOrgUnitId
columns.description: Identifier of the parent organizational unit in the hierarchy.

columns.name: Organization
columns.description: Internal organization or business unit the employee belongs to.

columns.name: OrganizationDetail
columns.description: Detailed subdivision within the employee's primary organization, representing a specific department, team, product group, cost center, or functional sub-unit used for operational or reporting purposes.

columns.name: CompanyOfficeState
columns.description: State where the employee's office is located.

columns.name: CompanyOfficeCity
columns.description: City where the employee's office is located.

columns.name: FunctionType
columns.description: Broad functional area of the employee's job.

columns.name: Layer
columns.description: Hierarchical level in the company's organizational structure.

tables.description: Defines the company's organizational structure — units, cost centers, regions, and hierarchical relationships.

tables.name: WorkAssignment

columns.name: AssignmentId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the work assignment record.

columns.name: EmployeeId
columns.description: Foreign key linking work assignment to the employee's master record.

columns.name: OrgUnitId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the organizational unit.

columns.name: WeeklyBadgeOnsiteDays
columns.description: Average number of days per week the employee is on-site.

tables.description: Represents a non-permanent or additional assignment of an employee — e.g., project assignment, rotation, temporary assignment.

sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: Staff_Number in Personnel_Records is system-assigned and correlates directly to EmployeeId. Highest ranked and best semantic fit.
sources_attributes_suggestions.preview_sql: SELECT Staff_Number AS EmployeeId FROM Personnel_Records
sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT Staff_Number AS EmployeeId FROM Personnel_Records

sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: Work_Email in Workers represents the employee's email address and is the closest real attribute to PersonId.
sources_attributes_suggestions.preview_sql: SELECT Work_Email AS PersonId FROM Workers
sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT Work_Email AS PersonId FROM Workers

sources_attributes_suggestions.transformation_hint: Join Workers.Manager_ID to Workers.Employee_ID to retrieve Work_Email of manager
sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: Manager_ID provides linkage to the manager; Work_Email is needed, but only Manager_ID exists for now. Simple reference without manager's email.
sources_attributes_suggestions.preview_sql: SELECT Manager_ID AS ManagerId FROM Workers
sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT Manager_ID AS ManagerId FROM Workers

sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: Activation_Date signals when role/position became effective; closest match for EffectiveDate.

sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: Commencement_Date is the official date of hire for employees; best direct semantic match.
sources_attributes_suggestions.preview_sql: SELECT Commencement_Date AS HireDate FROM Personnel_Records
sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT Commencement_Date AS HireDate FROM Personnel_Records

sources_attributes_suggestions.transformation_hint: Map Mission_Critical_Flag boolean to supervisor indicator values ('Y'/'N')
sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: Mission_Critical_Flag can signal supervisory/manager role, but mapping required. No direct supervisor flag.
sources_attributes_suggestions.preview_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN Mission_Critical_Flag THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SupervisorIndicator FROM Role_Definitions
sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN Mission_Critical_Flag THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SupervisorIndicator FROM Role_Definitions

sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: Engagement_Type in Personnel_Records specifies contract type and maps directly.
sources_attributes_suggestions.preview_sql: SELECT Engagement_Type AS EmploymentType FROM Personnel_Records
sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT Engagement_Type AS EmploymentType FROM Personnel_Records

sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: Current_Status refers to the employment state (active, on leave, terminated), matching CurrentEmploymentStatus.

sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT Current_Status AS CurrentEmploymentStatus FROM Personnel_Records

sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT Administrative_Region AS RegionSummary FROM Workplace_Sites

sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: Municipality represents the city of work assignment; direct mapping for CitySummary.

sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT Municipality AS CitySummary FROM Workplace_Sites

sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: First_Name is the employee's legal first name; direct correspondence to FirstName.
sources_attributes_suggestions.preview_sql: SELECT First_Name AS FirstName FROM Workers
sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT First_Name AS FirstName FROM Workers

sources_attributes_suggestions.transformation_hint: No middle name attribute present; placeholder field. Use Personnel_Identifier as null or empty.

sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT ws.Municipality AS CompanyOfficeCity FROM Organizational_Units ou JOIN Workplace_Sites ws ON ou.Physical_Location_ID = ws.Site_Identifier

sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT Unit_Classification AS FunctionType FROM Organizational_Units

sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT Unit_Subclassification AS Layer FROM Organizational_Units

sources_attributes_suggestions.transformation_hint: Use Role_Definitions.Role_Identifier as unique identifier representing the work assignment.
sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: AssignmentId requires a unique identifier for each work assignment. Role_Definitions.Role_Identifier best matches this requirement as it represents a unique assignment/role instance.

sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT Role_Identifier AS AssignmentId FROM Role_Definitions

sources_attributes_suggestions.transformation_hint: Join Role_Definitions.Incumbent_Worker_ID = Workers.Worker_ID to get corresponding Employee_ID.

sources_attributes_suggestions.preview_sql: SELECT w.Employee_ID AS EmployeeId FROM Role_Definitions rd JOIN Workers w ON rd.Incumbent_Worker_ID = w.Worker_ID
sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT w.Employee_ID AS EmployeeId FROM Role_Definitions rd JOIN Workers w ON rd.Incumbent_Worker_ID = w.Worker_ID

sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: No direct count of onsite days exists. Schedule_Classification best encodes work schedule type, from which onsite presence per week might be derived (possibly mapping descriptions like '5x8', '3x12', etc).
sources_attributes_suggestions.preview_sql: SELECT Schedule_Classification AS WeeklyBadgeOnsiteDays FROM Role_Definitions

sources_attributes_suggestions.reasoning: Assignment_Location_ID refers to the work location for the assignment; Workplace_Sites.Facility_Designation describes the worksite. This is the clearest, highest-confidence mapping for worksite designation.

sources_attributes_suggestions.spark_sql: SELECT ws.Facility_Designation AS WorksiteDesignation FROM Role_Definitions rd JOIN Workplace_Sites ws ON rd.Assignment_Location_ID = ws.Site_Identifier

sql.preview_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW OrgHierarchy AS
SELECT 
  ou.Organizational_Unit_ID AS OrgUnitId,
  ou.Parent_Unit_Reference AS ParentOrgUnitId,
  ou.Supervising_Organization AS Organization,
  ou.Unit_Designation AS OrganizationDetail,
  COALESCE(ws.Nation, '') AS CountryOrRegion,
  COALESCE(ws.Administrative_Region, '') AS RegionSummary,
  COALESCE(ws.Administrative_Region, '') AS CompanyOfficeState,
  COALESCE(ws.Municipality, '') AS CompanyOfficeCity,
  ou.Unit_Classification AS FunctionType,
  CASE 
    WHEN ou.Unit_Subclassification ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(ou.Unit_Subclassification AS INTEGER)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS Layer
FROM Organizational_Units ou
LEFT JOIN Workplace_Sites ws
  ON ou.Physical_Location_ID = ws.Site_Identifier;
sql.spark_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW OrgHierarchy AS
SELECT
  ou.Organizational_Unit_ID AS OrgUnitId,
  ou.Parent_Unit_Reference AS ParentOrgUnitId,
  ou.Supervising_Organization AS Organization,
  ou.Unit_Designation AS OrganizationDetail,
  COALESCE(ws.Nation, '') AS CountryOrRegion,
  COALESCE(ws.Administrative_Region, '') AS RegionSummary,
  COALESCE(ws.Administrative_Region, '') AS CompanyOfficeState,
  COALESCE(ws.Municipality, '') AS CompanyOfficeCity,
  ou.Unit_Classification AS FunctionType,
  CASE 
    WHEN ou.Unit_Subclassification RLIKE '^[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(ou.Unit_Subclassification AS INT)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS Layer
FROM Organizational_Units ou
LEFT JOIN Workplace_Sites ws
  ON ou.Physical_Location_ID = ws.Site_Identifier

sql.preview_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW Position AS
SELECT
  rd.Position_Reference_Number AS PositionId,
  rd.Role_Designation AS PositionTitle,
  rd.Owning_Organization_ID AS OrgUnitId,
  mgr.Position_Reference_Number AS ManagerPositionId,
  rd.Career_Stage AS CareerStage
FROM Role_Definitions rd
LEFT JOIN Role_Definitions mgr
  ON rd.Responsible_Organization = mgr.Role_Identifier
WHERE rd.Position_Reference_Number IS NOT NULL
  AND rd.Role_Designation IS NOT NULL
  AND rd.Owning_Organization_ID IS NOT NULL
  AND mgr.Position_Reference_Number IS NOT NULL
  AND rd.Career_Stage IS NOT NULL;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW Position AS
SELECT
  rd.Position_Reference_Number AS PositionId,
  rd.Role_Designation AS PositionTitle,
  rd.Owning_Organization_ID AS OrgUnitId,
  mgr.Position_Reference_Number AS ManagerPositionId,
  rd.Career_Stage AS CareerStage

LEFT JOIN Role_Definitions mgr
  ON rd.Responsible_Organization = mgr.Role_Identifier
WHERE rd.Position_Reference_Number IS NOT NULL
  AND rd.Role_Designation IS NOT NULL
  AND rd.Owning_Organization_ID IS NOT NULL
  AND mgr.Position_Reference_Number IS NOT NULL
  AND rd.Career_Stage IS NOT NULL

sql.preview_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW Person AS
SELECT
    pr.Staff_Number AS EmployeeId,
    w.Work_Email AS PersonId,
    w_mgr.Work_Email AS ManagerId,
    rd.Position_Reference_Number AS PositionId,
    rd.Activation_Date AS EffectiveDate,
    pr.Commencement_Date AS HireDate,
    CASE WHEN rd.Mission_Critical_Flag = TRUE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SupervisorIndicator,
    pr.Engagement_Type AS EmploymentType,
    pr.Professional_Title AS EmployeeProfession,
    pr.Current_Status AS CurrentEmploymentStatus,
    ws.Nation_Code AS CountryOrRegion,
    ws.Administrative_Region AS RegionSummary,
    ws.Municipality AS CitySummary,
    w.First_Name AS FirstName,
    NULL AS MiddleName,
    w.Last_Name AS LastName,
    CONCAT(w.First_Name, ' ', w.Last_Name) AS FullName,
    ws.Municipality AS AssignedOfficeCity,
    ws.Administrative_Region AS CompanyOfficeState,
    w.Job_Title AS EmployeeJobTitle,
    w.Department AS FunctionType,
    rr.Pay_Scale_Level AS StockLevel,
    pr.Commencement_Date AS WorkAnniversaryDate,
    rr.Payment_Currency AS PayScaleArea,
    rr.Adjustment_Rationale AS ReasonForChangeCode,
    ar.Duration_In_Days AS ExpectedInOfficeDays,
    ar.Duration_In_Days AS ApprovedInOfficeDays,
    ws.Facility_Category AS WorkSiteDesignation,
    -- StockLevelCompressionInd: 'Y' if employee's Equity_Grant_Value < manager's, else 'N'.
    CASE WHEN rr.Equity_Grant_Value < mgr_rr.Equity_Grant_Value THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS StockLevelCompressionInd,
    -- OrgDepth: count segments in Unit_Reference_Code by delimiter (assume delimiter is '.')
    CASE WHEN ou.Unit_Reference_Code IS NOT NULL THEN array_length(string_to_array(ou.Unit_Reference_Code, '.'), 1) ELSE 1 END AS OrgDepth,
    -- SameCountryAsManager: 'Y' if employee and manager Location_ID have same Nation_Code, else 'N'.
    CASE WHEN ws.Nation_Code = ws_mgr.Nation_Code THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SameCountryAsManager,
    -- InvoluntaryManagerChanges: count distinct Authorizing_Manager_ID in Absence_Records for this employee
    (
      SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ar2.Authorizing_Manager_ID)
      FROM Absence_Records ar2
      WHERE ar2.Personnel_Reference_ID = pr.Personnel_Identifier
    ) AS InvoluntaryManagerChanges,
    ws.Municipality AS MetroAreaCluster,
    -- WorksiteExceptionGranted: TRUE if ws.Operational_Status = FALSE, else FALSE
    CASE WHEN ws.Operational_Status = FALSE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS WorksiteExceptionGranted,
    -- FlexibleWorkGuidanceApplicable: 'Y' if Working_Schedule ILIKE '%flexible%', else 'N'
    CASE WHEN pr.Working_Schedule ILIKE '%flexible%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FlexibleWorkGuidanceApplicable
FROM
    Personnel_Records pr
    LEFT JOIN Workers w ON w.Employee_ID = pr.Staff_Number
    LEFT JOIN Role_Definitions rd ON rd.Incumbent_Worker_ID = w.Worker_ID
    LEFT JOIN Workplace_Sites ws ON ws.Site_Identifier = pr.Workplace_Location_ID
    LEFT JOIN Remuneration_Records rr ON rr.Personnel_Reference_ID = pr.Personnel_Identifier
    LEFT JOIN Absence_Records ar ON ar.Personnel_Reference_ID = pr.Personnel_Identifier
    LEFT JOIN Organizational_Units ou ON ou.Unit_Identifier = rd.Owning_Organization_ID
    -- Manager lookup
    LEFT JOIN Workers w_mgr ON w_mgr.Employee_ID = w.Manager_ID
    LEFT JOIN Workplace_Sites ws_mgr ON ws_mgr.Site_Identifier = w_mgr.Location_ID
    LEFT JOIN Remuneration_Records mgr_rr ON mgr_rr.Personnel_Reference_ID = w_mgr.Worker_ID
;
sql.spark_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW Person AS
SELECT
    pr.Staff_Number AS EmployeeId,
    w.Work_Email AS PersonId,
    w_mgr.Work_Email AS ManagerId,
    rd.Position_Reference_Number AS PositionId,
    rd.Activation_Date AS EffectiveDate,
    pr.Commencement_Date AS HireDate,
    CASE WHEN rd.Mission_Critical_Flag = TRUE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SupervisorIndicator,
    pr.Engagement_Type AS EmploymentType,
    pr.Professional_Title AS EmployeeProfession,
    pr.Current_Status AS CurrentEmploymentStatus,
    ws.Nation_Code AS CountryOrRegion,
    ws.Administrative_Region AS RegionSummary,
    ws.Municipality AS CitySummary,
    w.First_Name AS FirstName,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS MiddleName,
    w.Last_Name AS LastName,
    CONCAT(w.First_Name, ' ', w.Last_Name) AS FullName,
    ws.Municipality AS AssignedOfficeCity,
    ws.Administrative_Region AS CompanyOfficeState,
    w.Job_Title AS EmployeeJobTitle,
    w.Department AS FunctionType,
    rr.Pay_Scale_Level AS StockLevel,
    pr.Commencement_Date AS WorkAnniversaryDate,
    rr.Payment_Currency AS PayScaleArea,
    rr.Adjustment_Rationale AS ReasonForChangeCode,
    ar.Duration_In_Days AS ExpectedInOfficeDays,
    ar.Duration_In_Days AS ApprovedInOfficeDays,
    ws.Facility_Category AS WorkSiteDesignation,
    CASE WHEN rr.Equity_Grant_Value < mgr_rr.Equity_Grant_Value THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS StockLevelCompressionInd,
    -- OrgDepth: count segments in Unit_Reference_Code by delimiter (Spark: size(split(.,'.')))
    CASE WHEN ou.Unit_Reference_Code IS NOT NULL THEN size(split(ou.Unit_Reference_Code, '.')) ELSE 1 END AS OrgDepth,
    -- SameCountryAsManager: 'Y' if employee and manager Location_ID have same Nation_Code, else 'N'.
    CASE WHEN ws.Nation_Code = ws_mgr.Nation_Code THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SameCountryAsManager,
    -- InvoluntaryManagerChanges: count distinct Authorizing_Manager_ID in Absence_Records for this employee
    (
      SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ar2.Authorizing_Manager_ID)
      FROM Absence_Records ar2
      WHERE ar2.Personnel_Reference_ID = pr.Personnel_Identifier
    ) AS InvoluntaryManagerChanges,
    ws.Municipality AS MetroAreaCluster,
    CASE WHEN ws.Operational_Status = FALSE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS WorksiteExceptionGranted,
    CASE WHEN lower(pr.Working_Schedule) LIKE '%flexible%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FlexibleWorkGuidanceApplicable
FROM
    Personnel_Records pr
    LEFT JOIN Workers w ON w.Employee_ID = pr.Staff_Number
    LEFT JOIN Role_Definitions rd ON rd.Incumbent_Worker_ID = w.Worker_ID
    LEFT JOIN Workplace_Sites ws ON ws.Site_Identifier = pr.Workplace_Location_ID
    LEFT JOIN Remuneration_Records rr ON rr.Personnel_Reference_ID = pr.Personnel_Identifier
    LEFT JOIN Absence_Records ar ON ar.Personnel_Reference_ID = pr.Personnel_Identifier
    LEFT JOIN Organizational_Units ou ON ou.Unit_Identifier = rd.Owning_Organization_ID
    -- Manager lookup
    LEFT JOIN Workers w_mgr ON w_mgr.Employee_ID = w.Manager_ID
    LEFT JOIN Workplace_Sites ws_mgr ON ws_mgr.Site_Identifier = w_mgr.Location_ID
    LEFT JOIN Remuneration_Records mgr_rr ON mgr_rr.Personnel_Reference_ID = w_mgr.Worker_ID

sql.preview_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW WorkAssignment AS
SELECT
  rd.Role_Identifier AS AssignmentId,
  w.Employee_ID AS EmployeeId,
  ou.Organizational_Unit_ID AS OrgUnitId,
  CAST(
    CASE
      WHEN rd.Schedule_Classification LIKE '%F/T%' THEN 5
      WHEN rd.Schedule_Classification LIKE '%P/T%' THEN 2.5
      WHEN rd.Schedule_Classification ~ '[0-9]' THEN CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(rd.Schedule_Classification, '[^0-9.]', '', 'g') AS DECIMAL)
      ELSE 0
    END
  AS DECIMAL) AS WeeklyBadgeOnsiteDays,
  ws.Facility_Designation AS WorksiteDesignation
FROM Role_Definitions rd
INNER JOIN Workers w ON rd.Incumbent_Worker_ID = w.Worker_ID
INNER JOIN Organizational_Units ou ON rd.Owning_Organization_ID = ou.Organizational_Unit_ID
LEFT JOIN Workplace_Sites ws ON rd.Assignment_Location_ID = ws.Site_Identifier;
sql.spark_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW WorkAssignment AS
SELECT
  rd.Role_Identifier AS AssignmentId,
  w.Employee_ID AS EmployeeId,
  ou.Organizational_Unit_ID AS OrgUnitId,
  CAST(
    CASE
      WHEN rd.Schedule_Classification LIKE '%F/T%' THEN 5
      WHEN rd.Schedule_Classification LIKE '%P/T%' THEN 2.5
      WHEN rd.Schedule_Classification RLIKE '[0-9]' THEN CAST(regexp_replace(rd.Schedule_Classification, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL)
      ELSE 0
    END
  AS DECIMAL) AS WeeklyBadgeOnsiteDays,
  ws.Facility_Designation AS WorksiteDesignation
FROM Role_Definitions rd
INNER JOIN Workers w ON rd.Incumbent_Worker_ID = w.Worker_ID
INNER JOIN Organizational_Units ou ON rd.Owning_Organization_ID = ou.Organizational_Unit_ID
LEFT JOIN Workplace_Sites ws ON rd.Assignment_Location_ID = ws.Site_Identifier
